untranslatable_reason: Signal requires market microstructure metrics not available in allowed indicators: (1) 'Instrument is in bottom quartile of trading volume relative to asset class peers' requires cross-instrument peer comparison and percentile ranking within asset class; (2) 'Bid-ask spread exceeds 95th percentile of historical range' requires bid-ask spread data (not in allowed set); (3) 'Open interest or unique participant count is below 30th percentile of sector median' requires open interest and participant count metrics. The allowed volume indicator (volume, vol_ratio_20) cannot capture relative peer performance or bid-ask spreads. These are market structure conditions that exist outside standard OHLCV price/volume indicators.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally about market microstructure and liquidity conditions (thin markets, poor fills, low participation) rather than price action. While vol_ratio_20 and volume indicators exist, they cannot measure: (a) relative quartile standing vs peers within an asset class, (b) bid-ask spread dynamics, or (c) participant count. The entry conditions require external data feeds or cross-sectional analysis incompatible with single-instrument technical indicators. Consider implementing this signal in a separate market microstructure module with access to order book depth, bid-ask feeds, and cross-instrument comparative data.
